name: vivory-mcp-verification
summary: MCP for verifiable AI work: DOI/ORCID, archive, URL hash, dataset fingerprint, repro hash, C2PA/PDF/hash-chain provenance, peer-review, forecast, SEC EDGAR, GLEIF, Wikidata, ClinicalTrials, World Bank, USPTO, OSM, DefiLlama, USGS, MOLIT, RDAP whois + DoH DNS, EVM blockchain audit. 53 tools / 22 categories.
